source:
pub fn complex_function<T, U>(t: T, u: U) -> String
where
    T: Display + Clone,
    U: Display + Debug,
{
    format!("T: {}, U: {:?}", t, u)
}

process_numbers
source:
pub fn process_numbers(numbers: Vec<i32>) -> Vec<i32> {
    numbers
        .into_iter()
        .filter(|&x| x > 0)
        .map(|x| x * 2)
        .collect()
}

complex_pipeline
source:
pub fn complex_pipeline(numbers: Vec<i32>) -> i32 {
    numbers
        .into_iter()
        .filter(|&x| x > 0)
        .map(|x| x * 2)
        .filter(|&x| x < 100)
        .fold(0, |acc, x| acc + x)
}

source:
pub fn compare_areas<T, U>(shape1: &T, shape2: &U) -> bool
where
    T: Area,
    U: Area,
{
    shape1.area() > shape2.area()
}
